purpose: Wire the Phase 10F DamageTimingRiderAdapter into the existing DamageEngine to mutate declarative damage packets before ActorEngine.applyDamage enters DamageResolutionEngine.
implementationScope: Build a base declarative damage packet with sourceActor and targetActor context.
Return rider audit fields from DamageEngine.applyDamage result.
nonGoals: No edits to ActorEngine authority internals.
No automatic promotion of Advantageous Attack to implemented_correct until old wrong-shape metadata is quarantined.

remainingBeforeCorrect: Ensure all attack-to-damage UI flows pass attacker/sourceActor, targetActor, hit, and targetHasActedThisEncounter when available.
Quarantine or remove wrong-shape attack-option metadata for Advantageous Attack.
Add focused tests proving target-not-acted damage bonus and no attack bonus mutation.

unlocksPhase9Families: DamageEngine callers now receive damage timing rider support before canonical damage resolution.
Advantageous Attack compatibility rider can affect real damage packets when sourceActor/attacker context is supplied.
Applied damage rider audit data is returned from DamageEngine.applyDamage.
remainingWork: Audit all damage callsites for attacker/sourceActor and target context propagation.
Add exact combat acted-state flags instead of relying on conservative turn-order inference.
